recommendations.title: Smart Recommendations
recommendations.desc: Our AI analyzes thousands of options to suggest the best destinations, hotels, and experiences based on your tastes and budget.

planning.desc: Create a complete itinerary in minutes, not hours. Our AI speeds up the planning process so you can spend less time planning and more time dreaming.

personalization.title: Total Personalization
personalization.desc: From adventurous travelers to families looking for fun, our AI adapts to your specific needs to create the perfect trip for you.

testimonials.subtitle: Discover how our AI technology has transformed the way people plan and experience their adventures.

testimonialsItems.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonialsItems.text: The AI planned our honeymoon in Bali perfectly. We saved hours of research and discovered incredible places we never would have found on our own.

testimonialsItems.name: Miguel Silva
testimonialsItems.text: I used the platform for a business trip to Tokyo. The efficiency and hotel recommendations near my meetings were flawless.

testimonialsItems.name: Elena Rodriguez
testimonialsItems.text: The budget feature was a lifesaver. We managed to take a family trip through Europe staying within budget without sacrificing quality.
